expected: candidate build must not mutate canonical normalized manifest
actual: canonical manifest was replaced by 10 bounded records
root_cause: CodeBuildService keyed normalized output only by library/version, not candidate namespace

expected: task terminal failed and locks released
actual: locks released by finally but task/attempt remained running
reproduction: interrupt active TaskExecutor operation with Ctrl-C

expected: active index remains at safe prior state
actual: Qdrant 1118->6227 and local state 124->629 before interruption
root_cause: document-by-document writes span Qdrant, SQLite and filesystem without transaction/candidate enforcement
resolution: direct production writes are disabled; all writes use immutable isolated releases; active-scope candidate was promoted and rolled back with committed transaction state

expected: one-step recovery restores all index artifacts
actual: Qdrant restored but SQLite/artifacts required reconciliation and 20-document reindex
resolution: Snapshot 2.1 binds Qdrant checksum, immutable release manifest and artifact fingerprint; real recovery to a new candidate restored and validated normalized/SQLite/chunks/Qdrant without manual reconciliation

actual: runner injected exact catalog hit from expected_symbol and filtered by expected_function
root_cause: expected labels reused as query inputs

expected: exact symbol source precedes vector evidence
actual: empty evidence envelope although Symbol Catalog contained the method
root_cause: HubQueryService applied symbol only as Qdrant metadata filter and did not merge SymbolIndex

expected: running V2 API exposes unified endpoint
actual: running knowledgehub-rag-app:0.2.5 is healthy, exposes /knowledge/query and returns authenticated evidence for all three knowledge bases
root_cause: runtime image/tag drift and privileged deployment boundary
resolution: rebuilt and force-recreated search-api; authenticated health/OpenAPI/literature/code/writing smoke passed and unauthenticated health returned 401

actual: CLI and MCP now batch candidate/source text through the configured Writing embedding endpoints and evaluate cosine similarity with model provenance
root_cause: CLI used lexical/structural layers without semantic scorer
resolution: added fail-closed embedding semantic audit to both CLI and MCP; deterministic and live embedding validation return high risk and semantic=evaluated

actual: section family now classifies normalized complete headings; arbitrary paper titles containing Approach remain unmatched
resolution: shared conservative English/Chinese section-heading classifier is used by query filters and profile selection

actual: ordinary Literature queries now prefetch candidates and stable-partition bibliography sections after content; explicit references queries preserve original ranking
resolution: added metadata-only References/Bibliography demotion with an explicit-query exception and response warning

expected: candidate Qdrant, SQLite, chunks and normalized manifests are isolated as one release
actual: candidate collection was isolated but local RAG data_dir still referenced production state/artifacts
root_cause: candidate build overrode qdrant_collection but not data_dir
resolution: CandidateReleaseLayout binds a unique physical collection to release-scoped normalized/rag directories and freezes checksums after validation

expected: maintenance candidate preserves the complete active release scope
actual: source-wide build selected 17437 documents and 266691 chunks; partial candidate reached about 11057 points before safe interrupt
reproduction: compare selected documents with active manifest
root_cause: --all meant every localized source file, not all documents in the active release
regression_test: candidate scope fingerprint validation and source-expansion CLI gate
resolution: added bootstrap-candidate for exact active-release clone and require --allow-source-expansion before an all-source candidate becomes promotion eligible; partial candidate remained inactive and failed

expected: source, editable metadata and MCP server all report 0.2.5
actual: source, importlib metadata and running MCP now all report 0.2.5
root_cause: editable package metadata was not refreshed after the source version update
resolution: refreshed editable install and restarted both MCP listeners

actual: rebuilt 0.2.5 runtime returns 422 for both cases; behavior remains correct after container restart
root_cause: request enums were untyped strings and HubQueryService ValueError escaped the FastAPI route
resolution: typed request enums reject invalid values and route boundaries map service ValueError to HTTP 422

expected: default diff discovery includes changed, introduced and removed symbols
actual: default discovery now returns two real introduced methods plus four changed/shared symbols; dry-run generated 6 documents and 18 chunks
reproduction: run explicit --symbol dry-run for is_remote_code and is_custom_code
root_cause: SymbolIndex.changed_pairs only joined qualified names present in both versions
resolution: changed_pairs now uses a bounded union over shared, removed and introduced symbol IDs and loads either side when present

expected: numbered and descriptive academic subsections map to their section family
actual: the existing manifest now classifies 128/134 entries; unclassified entries fell from 71 to 6 while paper-title false positives remain excluded
root_cause: section hardening accepted only a small exact heading vocabulary and rejected valid descriptive subsection prefixes/suffixes
resolution: shared section-family normalization now handles academic numbering and bounded introduction/related-work/method/experiment/conclusion prefixes and suffixes

expected: figure/table captions and front-matter lines are excluded from Writing entries
actual: read-only re-derivation of the same five papers produces 101 entries with zero strict captions and zero title/front-matter entries
reproduction: aggregate source prefixes and section/title equality over formal writing_entries.jsonl
root_cause: paragraph extraction skipped tables/code/references but had no caption, short-line or title-front-matter gate
resolution: derivation now excludes strict numbered captions, short Latin material, source-title sections and front matter before analysis

expected: the task-defined ten Writing functions are represented by distinct classifier labels
actual: read-only 20-paper derivation emits all ten distinct target labels and the ten-class frozen classifier fixture passes
reproduction: compare emitted function labels with the ten-class acceptance taxonomy
root_cause: rules-v1 taxonomy predated the V2 acceptance labels and lacked dedicated quantitative comparison and limitation branches
resolution: rules now distinguish background, quantitative comparison and limitation while retaining the other seven V2 labels
